# Fantail Weddings

Boutique, founder-led wedding planning for elopements and intimate weddings across the South Island of Aotearoa, New Zealand.

## Services
- [The Wedding Navigator](https://fantailweddings.co.nz/the-wedding-navigator/): an online consultancy for couples planning their own New Zealand wedding.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://fantailweddings.co.nz/)
- [Portfolio](https://fantailweddings.co.nz/portfolio/)
- [The Journal](https://fantailweddings.co.nz/journal/)
- [Queenstown weddings guide](https://fantailweddings.co.nz/queenstown-wedding-planner/)
- [Wanaka weddings guide](https://fantailweddings.co.nz/nz-wanaka-wedding-planner/)

## Contact
Email: rebecca@fantailweddings.com
